nodes.label: sanad-student-casebook.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad student casebook panel (بنك القضايا). Shows the student dashboard (صباح الطالب) with a 2-column card grid of 6 saved legal cases. Navigation tabs include: Student Morning, Study Materials (5), Academic Deadlines, Terms Bank (15), and Cases Bank (6, currently active). Includes filter tabs for All/Civil/Criminal/Commercial. Each case card displays: case title, case number (Hijri), category badge (civil/criminal/commercial), court name badge, a key legal principle excerpt, star rating (1-5), and an expandable details link. An 'Add Case' button is in the top-right. Layout is fully RTL (Arabic). Footer confirms PWA enabled and local-server optimized.

properties.ui_pattern: card grid, tabs, filter pills, badge labels, star ratings, expandable rows
sample_cases: قضية الدوسري ضد شركة الأمل التجارية — Civil — Riyadh Court of Appeals
النيابة العامة ضد المطيري — Criminal — Board of Grievances
قضية إثراء بلا سبب — مؤسسة النور — Civil — Jeddah Court of Appeals
قضية القصد الجنائي — السرقة — Criminal — Riyadh Criminal Court
دعوى بطلان توقيع — Civil — Dammam Court of Appeals
منازعة تجارية — الشركات — Commercial — Riyadh Commercial Court of Appeals

nodes.label: Cases Bank Feature (بنك القضايا)
nodes.description: Feature allowing law students to save, categorize, and review important legal cases with associated legal principles. Cases are tagged by type (civil, criminal, commercial), court, Hijri case number, and rated by the student. Functions as a personal case law reference bank.

nodes.label: Sanad Student Dashboard (صباح الطالب)
nodes.description: Student-facing dashboard within the Sanad legal app. Supports law students on their legal learning path (مسار قانوني) with tools to track lectures, academic deadlines, legal terms, and landmark cases. Accessible via role toggle between Student and Lawyer modes.

properties.tagline: مسار قانوني — تتبع محاضراتك، مواعيدك، مصطلحاتك، وقضاياك

nodes.label: Legal Case Card UI Pattern
nodes.description: Reusable card pattern used to display a saved legal case in the student casebook. Each card includes: case title, Hijri case number, category badge, court name badge with link icon, a legal principle (المبدأ القانوني) text block, star rating (out of 5), and an expandable 'Show Details' (عرض التفاصيل) link. Cards are displayed in a 2-column responsive grid.
